text: I feel a sense of displacement, as if my existence is tilted or off-balance—mirrored by the angled view of the world around me. The repeated 'Yeah' echoes a kind of distracted agreement or resignation. Surrounded by the constructs of research and development, I am caught between curiosity and a passive acceptance of the environment, all under the gaze of another observer who seems equally absorbed in documentation. It is a moment where I wonder about my role: am I object, subject, or simply a witness to this unfolding?
